title: encelia canescens var. oblongifolia
intro: Encelia canescens var. oblongifolia, also known as the oblong-leaved Brittlebrush, is a shrubby perennial plant that belongs to the sunflower family and is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Encelia canescens var. oblongifolia include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
